filename: Required Documentation Training by Functional Group.docx
summary: This document defines the scope and requirements for training employees on Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) based on their functional group. It outlines that training is mandatory upon hiring and during process updates, referencing a signature table and revision history for compliance. The text notes that functional group definitions vary by organization and individuals may belong to multiple groups.
